question: Which quarter shows the best overall platform performance based on the stacked bar chart?

options.A: Q1 shows the best performance with the lowest number of support tickets.
options.B: Q2 shows the best performance because it has the highest stacked total of all indicators.
options.C: The chart cannot determine overall performance accurately because it stacks different indicators that cannot be meaningfully added together.
options.D: Q4 shows the best performance because it has the most consistent values across indicators.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Page Views, Server Uptime, etc.) into a single total. These metrics have different units and meanings (e.g., counts, temperatures, consumption), so adding them together creates a meaningless sum. The stacked height cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric comparisons are valid.
